seo.title: easywed.
seo.description: Plan table layouts, assign guests, and create the perfect wedding hall floor plan.
common.name: Name
errors.crashed_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.
sync.save_failed: Couldn't save your changes — they may be lost when you reload.
auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue planning
auth.sign_up_hint: Fill in the fields above and click "Create account" to register.
auth.email_sent: Check your email — we sent you a confirmation link.
auth.session_failed: Couldn't verify your session. Please refresh and try again.
members.title: Members
members.copy_failed: Couldn't copy — try selecting the link manually.
invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or expired.
wedding.load_failed: Couldn't load this wedding. Please try again.
wedding.hub.title: What would you like to do?
wedding.hub.planner_desc: Arrange tables and seat your guests
wedding.hub.reminders_desc: Keep track of important dates and tasks
weddings.subtitle: Pick a wedding to plan, or create a new one.
weddings.empty: No weddings yet. Create your first one above.
tables.shape.custom_readonly: Custom imported shape — geometry can't be edited here.
tables.dimensions_oob: Table of this size wouldn't fit in this hall
tables.select_to_edit: Select a table on the canvas to edit it, or click to add a new one.
tables.seated_elsewhere.unknown: Guest is already seated at another table.
tables.seated_elsewhere.named: Guest is already seated at table "{{name}}".
tables.seated_elsewhere.with_preview: Guest is already seated at table with guests {{preview}}.
tables.seated_elsewhere.with_preview_ext: Guest is already seated at table with guests {{preview}} +{{extra}}.
tables.seated_elsewhere.hint: Assigning to this table will unassign from the original one.
fixtures.select_to_edit: Select a fixture on the canvas to edit it, or click to add a new one.
fixtures.add_tooltip: A fixed object in the venue — stage, DJ booth, column, etc.
fixtures.shape.polygon_readonly: Custom imported shape — geometry can't be edited here.
fixtures.dimensions_oob: Fixture of this size wouldn't fit in this hall
guests.add.name: Name
guests.add.note_placeholder: e.g. allergic to nuts, loves spicy food, etc.
guests.import.title: Import guests from CSV or Excel
guests.import.intro: Upload a .csv or .xlsx file. We'll detect the columns, let you map them, and preview before adding.
guests.import.map_columns: Match each field to a column from your file.
guests.import.col.name: Name
guests.import.overflowed: {{count}} guests were left unassigned because their table is already full.
guests.import.overflowed_one: {{count}} guest was left unassigned because their table is already full.
guests.import.large_warning: That's {{count}} guests — adding them may take a moment and they'll be hard to review here. Double-check the columns above first.
guests.import.parse_failed: Couldn't read that file. Import expects a simple table: a header row with one guest per row (e.g. Name, Table). If you exported from here, choose the Flat CSV — the grouped layout can't be re-imported.
guests.import.empty: That file has no data rows.
theme.label: Theme
hall.empty_state: Click to start by configuring the hall
reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.create.title: Create a reminder
canvas.grid.spacing_tooltip: Controls how far apart grid lines are drawn in the hall
canvas.snap.tooltip: Tables snap to this distance when dropped
measure.tooltip: Toggle measuring tool — click two points on the hall to measure the distance
seats.tooltip: Show guests as seats around each table
measure.mode.tooltip: Snap to object center or nearest edge when clicking on a table or fixture
measure.statusbar: Click on the hall to place a measurement point
measure.statusbar_drop: Click again to drop the end point
export.col.name: Name
export.csv.title: Export guest list to CSV
export.csv.table_disabled_hint: Table is shown as section headings in grouped mode
export.csv.preview_empty: Pick at least one column to see a preview
export.csv.preview_no_guests: No guests yet — add some to see a preview
export.pdf.title: Export as PDF
export.dxf.title: Export hall plan to CAD
import.dxf.title: Import hall plan from CAD
import.dxf.intro: Pick a CAD (.dxf) file. We'll detect the layout, preview it, then replace the current hall plan.
import.dxf.create.title: Create wedding from CAD
import.dxf.create.intro: Pick a CAD (.dxf) file to create a new wedding with the imported hall plan.
import.dxf.create.failed: Failed to create the wedding. Please try again.
import.dxf.commit_failed: Import failed. Check your role on this wedding and try again.
import.dxf.step.layers_intro: Tell us what each layer represents.
import.dxf.preview.destructive: This will replace the current hall, tables and fixtures.
import.dxf.unit.label: Source unit
import.dxf.warning.unit_assumed: No units found in the file — assuming meters. Use the unit selector if that's wrong.
import.dxf.warning.no_hall: No hall outline was found on the selected layers.
import.dxf.warning.hall_synthesized: Hall sized to fit imported objects with 1 m padding on each side.
import.dxf.warning.ambiguous_layer: Multiple layers map to the same role.
import.dxf.warning.parse_error: Could not parse the DXF file.
